name: Gnars Operations - Q1 2026 Workstream
objective: Maintain Gnars infrastructure, consolidate data and governance archives, expand AI-native tooling, and support product and commerce readiness.
outputs: Revenue and expense tracking|Unified governance archive|BI dashboard|AI knowledge base|Shop route and operational QA
kpis: Dashboard uptime|Archive completeness|Proposal analytics coverage|Treasury reporting cadence|Agent-answerable knowledge coverage
notes: As of 2026-03-18, the live proposal page still shows this workstream as active and ending on 2026-03-20.

name: Gnars Revamp: Docs and Governance
objective: Recover, structure, and unify fragmented Gnars history, governance data, documentation, and legacy media into a developer-ready repository.
outputs: Governance archive|Documentation consolidation|Governance taxonomy|Strategic report|Data schemas
kpis: Proposal history coverage|Treasury spend categorization|Searchable documentation|Onboarding friction reduction
notes: Although proposal 111 was defeated, its scope became the foundation for the broader operations workstream.
